title: Liamine Zeroual, Algerian President During Bloody Civil War, Dies at 84
summary_full: Cutting short his five-year term amid the scarring conflict, he was perhaps a first: an Algerian leader who left without being forced out or dying in office.
summary_public: Cutting short his five-year term amid the scarring conflict, he was perhaps a first: an Algerian leader who left without being forced out or dying in office.
